title: 5  인공위성 RS 시스템
text:
5.2 Landsat 시스템

5.2.1 WRS(World Reference System
기본 패키지를 설치한다.

library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(spData)

WRS 셰이프 파일을 불러온다.

wrs2_desc <- st_read("D:/My R/World Data Manupulation/USGS Landsat Systems/WRS2_descending_0/WRS2_descending.shp", options = "ENCODING=CP949")

options:        ENCODING=CP949 
Reading layer `WRS2_descending' from data source 
  `D:\My R\World Data Manupulation\USGS Landsat Systems\WRS2_descending_0\WRS2_descending.shp' 
  using driver `ESRI Shapefile'
Simple feature collection with 28892 features and 14 fields
Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
Dimension:     XY
Bounding box:  xmin: -180 ymin: -82.6401 xmax: 180 ymax: 82.6401
Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84

wrs2_desc <- wrs2_desc |> 
  mutate(
    PATH_ROW = str_c(
      PATH, ROW, sep = "-"
    ), .after = ROW
  ) 

wrs2 데이터가 너무 커서 여기에 나타내지는 않는다.
한반도와 관련된 지도만 제작한다.

world_map <- st_read("D:/My R/World Data Manupulation/NaturalEarth/new_1_ne_50m_admin_0_countries.shp")

Reading layer `new_1_ne_50m_admin_0_countries' from data source 
  `D:\My R\World Data Manupulation\NaturalEarth\new_1_ne_50m_admin_0_countries.shp' 
  using driver `ESRI Shapefile'
Simple feature collection with 244 features and 170 fields
Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
Dimension:     XY
Bounding box:  xmin: -180 ymin: -89.99893 xmax: 180 ymax: 83.59961
Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84

koreas <- world_map |> 
  filter(
    str_detect(ADMIN, "Korea")
  )
wrs2_desc |> 
  st_intersects(koreas) |> lengths() > 0 -> sel_index
wrs2_koreas <- wrs2_desc |> 
  filter(
    sel_index
  )
tm_shape(world_map) + tm_polygons(col = "gray95") +
  tm_shape(koreas) + tm_polygons() +
  tm_shape(wrs2_koreas, is.master = TRUE) + tm_polygons(border.col = "#984ea3", lwd = 1, alpha = 0) + tm_text("PATH_ROW", size = 0.5) +
  tm_scale_bar(color.dark = "gray60", position = c(0.52, 0.01), breaks = seq(0, 400, 100), size = 0.3)
